summary: SDK Enhancement: Separate Registration Number and Tracking ID fields + CLEARTEXT fix + Comprehensive Testing

field_separation.description: Separated registrationNumber and trackingId as two independent mandatory fields

ScanOptions.before: ScanOptions(registrationNumber: String, manufacturer: String?, year: Int?, onProgress: ((ScanStage) -> Unit)?)
ScanOptions.after: ScanOptions(registrationNumber: String, trackingId: String, manufacturer: String?, year: Int?, onProgress: ((ScanStage) -> Unit)?)

cleartext_fix.description: Added network security config to allow HTTP cleartext to analytics endpoint

whitebox_tests.description: Internal logic and structure validation tests

blackbox_tests.description: User-facing API and UI integration tests
test_categories: Input field tests (both fields visible and editable)
Scan button enable/disable based on field validation
Full scan flow tests with both fields

updates: Updated Quick Start example with both mandatory fields
Added Testing section with test categories

validation_notes.compilation: Cannot verify in this environment (no Java/Android SDK)
validation_notes.syntax_review: Kotlin syntax manually verified - should compile
validation_notes.recommendation: Run `./gradlew :sdk:test` in x86_64 environment to execute unit tests

test_execution_instructions.ci_pipeline: Push to GitHub and enable Actions for automated testing

breaking_changes.ScanOptions: Now requires trackingId parameter (second mandatory parameter)
breaking_changes.migration: Update all ScanOptions() calls to include trackingId: sdk.runFullScan(ScanOptions(registrationNumber = "...", trackingId = "..."))
